Maturity (D·W·M) combo stats — ALL trades

Maturity grades (Daily·Weekly·Monthly) measured at trade entry · 2pc / 3pc / 4pc_v2 / legacy 4pc bounce-tolerance cuts · built 2026-06-23

hoiboy.uk
⚠ Cuts are non-comparable — shown per-bp, never pooled. 4pc = legacy symmetric-0.02 detection over 20 period slices (all 3 timeframes); 2pc / 3pc / 4pc_v2 = directional cuts (touch-window 0.02 / 0.03 / 0.04), single production window, daily + weekly only (no monthly). 2pc is the live cut. Stop = r ≤ −0.9 (initial-stop proxy, 97.8%). ΣR = accumulated P&L (sum of R).
★ The ★ badges mark the best combos by low SL-hit% + good R:R + expectancy, confidence-weighted by sample size (trusted ≈ n/(n+100), else regress toward the average, so a large-n edge outranks a thin-n one — but a rare-but-strong small pool still surfaces). Blue ★1–10 = the ALL tab (combos pooled over all timeframes) and Monthly. Purple ★1–20 = the shared Daily + Weekly ranking — daily and weekly compete for the SAME slots, so you can see how many daily entries surface vs weekly. Ranked on the live 2pc cut (monthly on 4pc); the other cuts' columns are shown for your own comparison.
📊 Each cut leads with its own fg (frequency graph) sparkline — when that cut's entries fired across its backtest window. Bar height = entries that period (scaled to the combo's own peak; absolute size is the n column); bar colour = that period's net R (green = profitable / red = losing); blanks = none — so the shape shows when the clusters fired AND whether they made money. The 3 directional cuts (2pc/3pc/4pc_v2) share one aligned window so their bars line up; 4pc spans its own ~12–15yr legacy window. It exposes clustering: a combo can average 'once a week' yet fire a dozen in a month then sit idle — and you only hold 10 positions, so clustered setups compete for the same slots. Hover an fg header for the window, a bar-row for counts + net R. The tables are wide — scroll right to reach 4pc; the combo column stays pinned.
Highlight

% pool = each combo's share of its bp's complete-grade pool in this timeframe (denominator per bp: 2pc=108,457 · 3pc=136,686 · 4pc_v2=151,676 · 4pc=912,672).

↗descendingPEAK

1,309,491 complete-grade trade-rows across the 7 symbols. ★N = rank N by low SL-hit% + good R:R + expectancy, confidence-weighted by sample size (the 2pc cut, pooled over all timeframes (blue top-10)).

Daily backtest window = D6m (~6 months, recent regime only) — daily entries carry materially higher stop-hit than weekly across every combo; treat daily-only stats as lower-power. Daily and weekly are ranked together (one shared purple ★1–20), so daily combos only earn a badge if they out-rank the weekly field.

% pool = each combo's share of its bp's complete-grade pool in this timeframe (denominator per bp: 2pc=46,849 · 3pc=59,695 · 4pc_v2=67,082 · 4pc=770,442).

↗descendingPEAK

E·E·D8561.8%-258.72-0.3060.2%31.7%9831.6%-411.06-0.4265.1%28.0%1,1601.7%-438.82-0.3863.8%29.1%23,4933.0%-11723.21-0.5067.5%30.2%

944,068 complete-grade trade-rows across the 7 symbols. ★N = rank N by low SL-hit% + good R:R + expectancy, confidence-weighted by sample size (the shared Daily+Weekly purple top-20 on 2pc).

Weekly window = W3y (3 years). Weekly is the cleanest timeframe — stop-hit roughly halves vs daily for the same combo, so weekly entries take most of the shared purple ★1–20 slots.

% pool = each combo's share of its bp's complete-grade pool in this timeframe (denominator per bp: 2pc=61,608 · 3pc=76,991 · 4pc_v2=84,594 · 4pc=129,172).

↗descendingPEAK

E·E·D1,8693.0%-329.16-0.1862.4%33.3%2,1442.8%-542.37-0.2562.8%31.5%2,1102.5%-542.24-0.2662.7%31.4%3,5432.7%-448.13-0.1359.8%38.3%

352,365 complete-grade trade-rows across the 7 symbols. ★N = rank N by low SL-hit% + good R:R + expectancy, confidence-weighted by sample size (the shared Daily+Weekly purple top-20 on 2pc).

Monthly is 4pc-only. The directional cuts (2pc / 3pc / 4pc_v2) did not re-run monthly strategies, so they have zero monthly trades — only the legacy symmetric 4pc cut carries monthly. Note: 4pc monthly trades are ungraded (tslc='NA'), so the TSLC-A/B monthly view is empty; the monthly maturity still appears as the 3rd letter of every daily/weekly combo above. Ranked on 4pc (its own cut — cannot share with the 2pc daily/weekly ranking).

% pool = each combo's share of its bp's complete-grade pool in this timeframe (denominator per bp: 2pc=0 · 3pc=0 · 4pc_v2=0 · 4pc=13,058).

13,058 complete-grade trade-rows across the 7 symbols. ★N = rank N by low SL-hit% + good R:R + expectancy, confidence-weighted by sample size (the 4pc cut (blue top-10)).

The drop-off cliff for every timeframe view × bounce cut. Method: of the 8 top-maturity box shapes ({A,B}×{A,B}×{D,E}), drop any with n<50, sort by that cut's mean R, and take the biggest gap between consecutive shapes. cliff = that gap; floor = worst of the top cluster; best-below = next shape down; two-axis = SL-hit% worsens across the gap too (not just reward). The 4pc cut is the one the blog table uses.
The ★N after each shape is its official confidence-weighted rank in that view (blue = ALL top-10, purple = shared Daily+Weekly top-20 — the same shape can rank differently as a daily vs weekly setup, e.g. B·B·E is ★1 weekly but ★13 daily). A · means the shape didn't make that view's ranked list.
viewbp cutclifftop cluster (above gap)floor → best-belowSL-hit%two-axis
ALL2pc~1.72RB·A·E★6B·A·E★6 +4.44R → A·A·E★2 +2.72R16% → 26%yes
3pc~2.35RB·A·E★6B·A·E★6 +5.35R → A·A·E★2 +3.00R17% → 24%yes
4pc_v2~1.94RA·A·E★2A·A·E★2 +3.13R → B·B·E★3 +1.19R25% → 34%yes
4pc (legacy)~0.94RB·A·E★6, A·A·E★2A·A·E★2 +2.23R → B·B·E★3 +1.29R27% → 30%yes
DAILY2pc~0.36RA·B·E★8, A·A·E★14A·A·E★14 +1.36R → A·A·D★19 +1.00R43% → 41%reward only
3pc~1.07RA·A·E★14A·A·E★14 +2.18R → A·B·E★8 +1.11R35% → 38%yes
4pc_v2~0.91RA·A·E★14A·A·E★14 +1.90R → A·B·E★8 +0.99R38% → 35%reward only
4pc (legacy)~1.00RB·A·E·, A·A·E★14A·A·E★14 +2.17R → B·B·E★18 +1.17R30% → 32%yes
WEEKLY2pc~1.07RA·A·E★1, B·B·E★3B·B·E★3 +2.57R → A·B·E★9 +1.50R24% → 25%yes
3pc~0.67RA·A·E★1, B·A·E★12, B·A·D★13, B·B·E★3, A·B·E★9, A·A·D★11A·A·D★11 +1.39R → B·B·D★20 +0.72R35% → 40%yes
4pc_v2~2.13RA·A·E★1A·A·E★1 +3.68R → B·B·E★3 +1.55R19% → 27%yes
4pc (legacy)~0.65RA·A·E★1A·A·E★1 +2.55R → B·A·E★12 +1.90R14% → 21%yes
MONTHLY2pcinsufficient — monthly capped at grade C, every box shape n<50
3pcinsufficient — monthly capped at grade C, every box shape n<50
4pc_v2insufficient — monthly capped at grade C, every box shape n<50
4pc (legacy)~0.49RB·B·E★3, A·B·D★8, B·B·D·B·B·D· +1.04R → A·B·E· +0.55R30% → 37%yes
